---
title: "W8 assignment"
author: "Gabriele Olendraite"
date: "2026-04-29"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(epiwraps)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(AnnotationHub)
  library(ensembldb)
  library(edgeR)
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(bsseq)   # Class and tools to analyze bisulfite sequencing data at CpG-level
  library(DMRcate) # Identification of differentially-methylated regions
  library(GenomicRanges)
})
```

# Part 1

```{r}
bs <- readRDS("ESC_astrocytes_BSseq.rds")
bs

# remove CpGs that have 0 coverage in some samples:
bs <- bs[rowSums(assay(bs,"Cov")>0)==ncol(bs),]

design <- model.matrix(~celltype, data=pData(bs)) 
design
# adapt the design for methylation data:
methdesign <- modelMatrixMeth(design)

bs <- BSmooth(bs, BPPARAM=MulticoreParam(4, progress=TRUE))
```

```{r}
seqAnnot <- sequencing.annotate(bs, methdesign, all.cov=TRUE, coef="celltypeastrocytes")

dmrcateRes <- dmrcate(seqAnnot, C=2, min.cpgs=5)
dmrRanges <- extractRanges(dmrcateRes, genome="hg19")
saveRDS(dmrRanges, "dmr.rds")

ggplot(as.data.frame(dmrRanges), aes(meandiff, -log10(HMFDR), colour=width, size=no.cpgs)) + geom_point()


dmrRanges <- dmrRanges[order(abs(dmrRanges$meandiff), decreasing=TRUE)]
```

```{r}
# Filter for regions on chromosome 1
chr1_dmrs <- dmrRanges[seqnames(dmrRanges) == "chr1"]

# Get the top 5 (they are already sorted by meandiff in your code)
top5_chr1 <- chr1_dmrs[1:5]
```


```{r}
# 1. Extract the methylation matrix for these 5 specific regions
# 'bs' is your BSseq object
meth_matrix <- getMeth(bs, regions = top5_chr1, what = "perRegion")

# 2. Add gene symbols as row names (extracted from your DMR results)
rownames(meth_matrix) <- top5_chr1$overlapping.genes

# 3. Plot the heatmap
pheatmap(meth_matrix, 
         main = "Methylation Levels of Top 5 DMRs on Chr1",
         cluster_cols = TRUE, 
         show_colnames = TRUE)
```



# Part 2

Download:

```{r, download, eval=FALSE}
options(timeout = 6000)
download.file("https://www.ethz-ins.org/content/ATAC_AstroVsESC_subset.rds", "ATAC_AstroVsESC_subset.rds")
```


```{r}
atac <- readRDS('ATAC_AstroVsESC_subset.rds')
```

```{r}
overlaps <- findOverlaps(chr1_dmrs, atac)
```

```{r}
atac_agg <- aggregate(
    atac$logFC[subjectHits(overlaps)],
    by = list(idx = queryHits(overlaps)),
    FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE
)
final_atac_logFC <- rep(NA, length(chr1_dmrs))
final_atac_logFC[atac_agg$idx] <- atac_agg$x
```

```{r}
ov_meth <- findOverlaps(chr1_dmrs, granges(bs))
meth_values <- assay(bs, "M") / assay(bs, "Cov")
astro_means <- rowMeans(meth_values[, grep("astro", colnames(bs))], na.rm = TRUE)
esc_means   <- rowMeans(meth_values[, grep("ESC", colnames(bs))], na.rm = TRUE)

meth_agg <- aggregate(
    cbind(astro = astro_means[subjectHits(ov_meth)], 
          esc = esc_means[subjectHits(ov_meth)]),
    by = list(idx = queryHits(ov_meth)),
    FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)

df_final <- data.frame(
    dmr_id = 1:length(chr1_dmrs),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

df_final$atac_logFC <- final_atac_logFC
meth_diff_vector <- rep(NA, length(chr1_dmrs))
meth_diff_vector[meth_agg$idx] <- meth_agg$astro - meth_agg$esc
df_final$meth_diff <- meth_diff_vector
df_plot <- df_final[!is.na(df_final$meth_diff) & !is.na(df_final$atac_logFC), ]
print(nrow(df_plot))

df_final$type <- "None"
df_final$type[df_final$meth_diff < 0 & df_final$atac_logFC > 0] <- "Hypo + Open"
df_final$type[df_final$meth_diff > 0 & df_final$atac_logFC < 0] <- "Hyper + Closed"
df_final$type[df_final$meth_diff < 0 & df_final$atac_logFC < 0] <- "Hypo + Closed"
df_final$type[df_final$meth_diff > 0 & df_final$atac_logFC > 0] <- "Hyper + Open"
```

```{r}
plot(df_final$meth_diff, df_final$atac_logFC, 
     pch = 19, col = rgb(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
     xlab = "Δ Methylation (Astro - ESC)", 
     ylab = "ATAC-seq log2FC",
     main = "Accessibility change vs methylation difference")

abline(h = 0, v = 0, lty = 2, col = "grey50")

# Add a trend line (Linear Model)
abline(lm(atac_logFC ~ meth_diff, data = df_final), col = "firebrick", lwd = 2)

points(df_final$meth_diff[df_final$type == "Hypo + Open"], 
       df_final$atac_logFC[df_final$type == "Hypo + Open"], 
       pch = 19, col = "dodgerblue")

points(df_final$meth_diff[df_final$type == "Hyper + Closed"], 
       df_final$atac_logFC[df_final$type == "Hyper + Closed"], 
       pch = 19, col = "orange")
```

After plotting the relationship between the differences of ATAC-seq and the differences of methylation, it was observed that there is a slightly negative correlation, meaning methylated sites tend to be not accessible, which is in agreement with previous knowledge.

```{r}
cor_test <- cor.test(df_final$meth_diff, df_final$atac_logFC, method = "spearman")
print(cor_test)
```
